Home > AI Music > Soundraw

Soundraw

★★★★☆ 5 songs/day Paid from: from $9.99/month

Visit official site →

An AI music generator that creates professional-quality music from text prompts, great for creators and content makers.

Free Credits Details

  • Amount: 5 songs
  • Reset: Resets daily
  • Watermark: No watermark
  • Commercial: 有限商业使用

Key Features

  • AI-powered music generation
  • Multiple genre options
  • Customizable duration and tempo
  • One-click file export
  • Simple and intuitive interface

Pros

  • Generous free credits for daily use
  • Fast generation with high quality
  • Easy to use without learning curve

Cons

  • Free version limited to 5 generations per day
  • Advanced features require a paid subscription

Tips

  • Experiment with different style and parameter combinations
  • Practice with free credits before considering paid plans
